gdpr.renewalSubject: Action Required: Do you still want to hear from us?
gdpr.renewalBodyHtml:
Hi {{firstName}},

It's been a while! To comply with data protection laws, we need you to confirm if you'd still like to receive our emails.

Yes, keep me subscribed

If you don't click the link within {{daysLimit}} days, we will automatically remove your data from our systems.
